title: Wemmbu mace
description: This pack make mace in skin Wemmbu.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bf50cbd50d6cbdce4fc3dc8a4ef336d4d462a5d.png)

Makes mace in Wemmbu skin.  
As for me, this is a unique pack, and it looks cool.  
Version 1.20.5-26.1  (Mace added in 1.20.5)
